title: Fijian Dominatrixes Are the Best
description:
Experience the 17th chapter of your journey to session with a dominatrix of every nationality.

After being dominated by Goddess Marie in Vanuatu, you continue on to Fiji, the next destination in your journey to be dominated by a dominatrix in every country, and you've booked a session with Goddess Miriama, the giant, sadistic, wealthy, playful, and dominant Fijian dominatrix.

Experience a session with Goddess Miriama, the giant, sadistic, wealthy, playful, and dominant Fijian dominatrix as she uses her 202 cm height to bully, torment, and humiliate you.

• ~1.5K words

• Kinetic novel

• 21 Unique character animations

• 23 Total images + animations

• A gallery featuring all animations in the game
description_short: Experience a session with Goddess Miriama, the giant, sadistic, wealthy, playful, and dominant Fijian dominatrix as she uses her 202 cm height to bully, torment, and humiliate you.
